Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.fluxnova

Class FluxnovaFormPropertyImpl

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.xml.impl.instance.ModelElementInstanceImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.BpmnModelElementInstanceImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.fluxnova.FluxnovaFormPropertyImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
BpmnModelElementInstance, FluxnovaFormProperty, ModelElementInstance
public class FluxnovaFormPropertyImpl extends BpmnModelElementInstanceImpl implements FluxnovaFormProperty
The BPMN formProperty camunda extension element
Author:
Sebastian Menski
